creator: quik@quikbox.ca
text:
Starting it from the console window, I get these messages & the root window goes grey but no windows ever pop up.

** WARNING **: Unable to open /proc/mounts: No such file or directory
Message: Successfully registered `OAFIID:nautilus_factory:bd1e1862-92d7-4391-963e-37583f0daef3'
Message: Successfully registered `OAFIID:Bonobo_Moniker_std_Factory'

How-To-Repeat: Start Nautilus
